attributes.description: Alerts when the 5xx error rate on a Traefik entrypoint exceeds threshold. Edge-level server errors.
attributes.name: [Traefik OTel] High 5xx error rate by entrypoint

investigation_guide.blob:
## Traefik high 5xx error rate by entrypoint

### What fired
Per-entrypoint 5xx rate exceeded threshold (min 100 total requests).

### Why it matters
Entrypoint-level 5xx rates reflect edge-level failures, including both upstream problems and Traefik-internal errors.

### Triage
1. Split to service/router-level 5xx rules.
2. Check upstream service health.

### Remediation
- Roll back / fix the failing upstream.

### Tuning
- Tune threshold to SLA.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-traefik.otel-*
// Limit to entrypoint-level request counters (counter requires TS + INCREASE)
| WHERE traefik_entrypoint_requests_total IS NOT NULL
// Aggregate total and 5xx requests per entrypoint over the time window
| STATS
    total = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total),
    errors_5xx = SUM(traefik_entrypoint_requests_total) WHERE attributes.code LIKE "5*"
  BY attributes.entrypoint
// Minimum sample size; adjust based on expected traffic per entrypoint
| WHERE total > 100
| EVAL error_rate_pct = ROUND(errors_5xx / total * 100.0, 2)
// Alert threshold: tune for sensitivity
| WHERE error_rate_pct > 5.0
| SORT error_rate_pct DESC
| LIMIT 10
